description: Legal document concerning debts, mentioning [...] b. Moshe known as al-Shay[kh?], Moshe b. Shelomo (known as Ibn Ḥassān), and the late Abū Naṣr "who used to sit in the shop we had together, and I spoke with him and asked him several times about the son of [...]." In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
